task:
Open /home/user/Documents/dark_base.png in GIMP as the base layer — a 500x500 solid RGB (40,40,80) fill — and add /home/user/Documents/light_top.png (solid RGB (120,120,120)) as a layer above it.

Configure the top layer with blend mode = Screen and opacity = 100%, then flatten and export as PNG to /home/user/Documents/screen_result.png. The output must be 500x500 with every pixel matching the Screen blend of the two flat layers (~RGB (141,141,162)).

verification.description: Center pixel matches Screen blend of (40,40,80) and (120,120,120): expected ~(141,141,162)
Top-left pixel also shows correct Screen blend (flat images, uniform result)
